title: RHT Secrets Support
body: We need the ability to pass subscription certificates for RHEL. It would also be nice to have the secrets patch extended so that other directories can be user defined and passed into the container.

comments.body: Closing this as an issue, have created a Trello card at: https://trello.com/c/if6SPPwZ/824-buildah-rht-secrets-support-demo
